question: (1) What are the two things God promised the Physical Israelites who left Egypt? (2) Include 2 reference verses.
correct: If they kept the covenant, God would have them be His kingdom of priests and a holy nation. Do not worship any other gods.

question: What is the purpose of God creating the physical realm according to the spiritual realm?
correct: To restore man and the earth and fulfill a world of God's reign.

question: God selects one shepherd in every era and shows him the kingdom of heaven to fulfill on earth. Write who is the shepherd who sees the things of heaven and fulfillment on this earth in each era: (1) The time of Moses, (2) The 1st Coming, and (3) The 2nd Coming. Provide one reference for each.
correct: Moses, Ex 25:8-9
Jesus, Jn 5:19
New John, Rev 4, Rev 21

question: Fill in the blanks of the main points of Isa 1:1 and Isa 2:4, in order.
correct: Vision regarding Judah and Jerusalem. Betrayal of the chosen people who were reared.
Destruction of the chosen people by the gentiles. A place where all nations will come to learn.
Turn spears into pruning hooks.

question: Write why Revelation is important. Include 2 references.
correct: Because we receive eternal life by knowing the true God.

question: Write (1) the reason and (2) the result of the chosen people of the Tabernacle of Heaven being defeated by the group of the dragon in Revelation. Additionally (3) the 12 Tribes in Revelation are created from what kind of people, and (4) what are the blessings they receive?
correct: Because they broke the covenant and betrayed like Adam.
Fled in seven ways.
Those who keep the new covenant.
Forgiveness of sins, heaven, and eternal life.

question: (1) Who is the promised shepherd of the Old Testament and (2) who is the promised shepherd of the New Testament, and what does each testify to?
correct: Jesus; the Old Testament prophecies and the physical fulfillment.
The one who overcomes, New John; the prophecies of the New Testament, Revelation, and the physical fulfillment.

question: (1) What is God's kingdom of the spiritual realm that comes down at the second coming? (2) Write on whom it comes down to. Include one reference.
correct: The holy city, the new Jerusalem.
The promised shepherd of the New Testament, the one who overcomes, Rv 3:12.
Sheep-like believers, Mt 25:34.
New heaven and new earth, Rv 21:1-4.

question: There are the subjects of the kingdom and those who sit in the kingdom of heaven in Mt 8:11-12. What are each of them referred to as in Mt 13?
correct: Those who are not harvested: the sons of the evil one (the devil).
Those who are harvested: the sons of heaven (God).

question: God prophesied the creation of a new thing through Jeremiah. Then, the completion of the creation of a new thing is fulfilled (1) when and (2) through what? Include one chapter.
correct: At the time of Revelation's fulfillment.
The creation of the twelve tribes of Shincheonji, Rv 21.

question: (1) Where is the place of salvation to flee to at the second coming in Mt 24? (2) Who is at this place?
correct: Mt Zion, where God's throne comes down to.
God's throne, Jesus, and God's family.

question: The wedding banquet of the Lamb at the second coming occurs (1) after what event, (2) and where? (3) What is the evidence of the wedding banquet of the Lamb?
correct: After the judgment of Babylon in Rv 18.
Shincheonji Church of Jesus, the Temple of the Tabernacle of the Testimony.
God's oxen (betrayers) and fattened cattle (destroyers).

question: What is at the place where God and Jesus are? Include 2 references.
correct: The Word in the beginning, Jn 1:1, 1 Jn 1:1-2.

question: What is God's objective?
correct: To create the twelve tribes, the new kingdom and new people.
To seize and lock up the dragon.
The marriage of spirit and flesh and God's reign.

question: (1) What is the food of eternal life at the second coming? (2) Through whom can this be eaten? Give a reference for each.
correct: Hidden manna, Rv 2:17.
The promised shepherd, New John, Rv 10.

question: (1) What is the meaning of "counselor"? (2) Who is the advocate that came with the spirit of the counselor according to Jesus' promise at the second coming?
correct: A teacher who protects with grace (advocate).
The one who overcomes, New John.

question: Write who the physical entities of the tree of life are on this earth at (1) the first coming and (2) the second coming.
correct: Jesus and the twelve disciples.
The one who overcomes, New John, and the twelve tribes of Shincheonji.

question: The effect of Jesus' blood appears (1) when and to (2) whom? Include the physical entities and reference verse.
correct: At the time of Revelation's fulfillment.
The 144,000 and the multitude in white of the twelve tribes of Shincheonji, Rv 1:5-6, Rv 5:9-10, Rv 7:14.

question: (1) What fulfills when the last seventh trumpet is sounded? (2) After what event is the seventh trumpet blown?
correct: God's victory, resurrection, and eternal life.
After the events of betrayal and destruction.

question: What is the requirement to become God's son and receive the inheritance? Include one reference verse.
correct: Fight and overcome Satan (the devil), Rv 21:7.

question: Although the churches of tradition have persecuted SCJ at the second coming, SCJ has overcome. What is the evidence that they overcame?
correct: As Jesus and the angels harvest with them, they bear 12 kinds of fruit every month and rapidly grow.

question: (1) Who are the physical entities of those who keep the new covenant? (2) Who are they in Mt 8:11?
correct: The twelve tribes of Shincheonji.
Those who are harvested from the east and the west and who sit in the kingdom of heaven.

question: At the second coming when Revelation is fulfilled, what are (1) the elementary teachings and (2) the perfect teaching?
correct: All the words from the time of Adam to right before Revelation's fulfillment.
The physical fulfillment of Revelation's prophecies.

question: The recreation of heaven and earth in Gn 1 is fully completed (1) when and with whose appearance, and (2) through the creation of what?
correct: At the time of Revelation's fulfillment, the promised shepherd of the New Testament (the one who overcomes, New John).
New heaven and new earth.

question: Explain the meaning of the name, Shincheonji Church of Jesus the Temple of the Tabernacle of the Testimony.
correct: New heaven new earth, that is, the new tabernacle and new saints.
Jesus is the owner of the church.
The tabernacle that testifies of the physical fulfillment of Revelation that it seen and heard.
